zh.lifeSummary: Isabella de Vere Tresham於從1455年到1456年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾德雷頓。她和Sir Henry de Vere, of Addington至少有1個女兒。她去世於從1490年到1491年在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾格亞特 阿丁頓,第一代西德默斯子爵。

nameMeanings.name: Tresham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Tresham in Hawkesbury (Gloucs).

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Vere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a Norman baronial name, from any of the numerous places in northern France so called from Gaulish ver(n) ‘alder’.

en.lifeSummary: Isabella de Vere Tresham was born from 1455 to 1456, in Drayton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 daughter with Sir Henry de Vere, of Addington. She died from 1490 to 1491, in Great Addington, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella de Vere Treshamはから1455年まで1456年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアドレイトンで生まれた。彼女はSir Henry de Vere, of Addingtonとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女はから1490年まで1491年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグレアト アッドイントンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella de Vere Tresham(은)는 1455년 부터 1456년 까지 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 드라이턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir Henry de Vere, of Addington(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1490년 부터 1491년 까지 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 그리트 애딩턴에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Isabella de Vere Tresham родилась с 1455 по 1456 в местности дреитон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Sir Henry de Vere, of Addington. Она умерла с 1490 по 1491 в местности грит аддингтон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.
